race.comment: PENSATIVA (4) smart Scone-trained mare ready to win at her fifth run back. Chased hard when no match for the progressive Taipan Legend over 1600m here at latest. Rates strongly here and can find winning form. INVINCIBLE RED (3) was a victim of circumstances with the apprentice aboard from the wide gate when tenth over 1600m at this track. Returned from a let-up on that occasion and fitter now with winning rider back aboard. Each way. AUSSIE NATION (9) staying type who resumed with a battling first-up sixth over 1600m at Newcastle. Comes back a few levels here and look for him late. INSTEAD (8) consistent mare with a good record at this level. Big drop in grade after catching the eye late with a surprise third over 1400m at Mudgee in the CDRA Champs. Go close.
